id.description: The unique identifier of the webhook.

userid.description: The user ID who created the webhook.

team_id.description: The Workspace ID the webhook belongs to.

endpoint.description: The URL that ClickUp sends event payloads to.

client_id.description: The OAuth client ID if the webhook was created via OAuth.

events.description: The events the webhook is subscribed to.

task_id.description: Optional task ID to scope webhook events to a specific task.

list_id.description: Optional list ID to scope webhook events to a specific list.

folder_id.description: Optional folder ID to scope webhook events to a specific folder.

space_id.description: Optional space ID to scope webhook events to a specific space.

status.description: The health status of the webhook (active, failing, etc.).

secret.description: The shared secret for HMAC-SHA256 signature verification. Only returned when the webhook is first created.
